exceptions.reason: The affected matcher is reachable only through the repository Markdown linter and is not shipped to WordPress sites.
exceptions.control: Lint only reviewed repository files; pull-request CI uses a read-only token and receives no production secrets.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when the @wordpress/scripts Markdown lint path resolves minimatch 3.1.4 or newer.

exceptions.reason: The affected matcher is reachable only through the repository Markdown linter and is not shipped to WordPress sites.
exceptions.control: Lint only reviewed repository files; pull-request CI uses a read-only token and receives no production secrets.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when the @wordpress/scripts Markdown lint path resolves minimatch 3.1.3 or newer.

exceptions.reason: The affected server is a local @wordpress/scripts development dependency and is absent from shipped plugin assets.
exceptions.control: Bind development servers to loopback, never expose them to untrusted networks, and avoid untrusted sites while they run.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when @wordpress/scripts provides webpack-dev-server 5.2.5 or newer.

exceptions.reason: Babel processes repository-controlled source during build and test; it is not included as WordPress runtime code.
exceptions.control: Build only reviewed repository source; pull-request CI uses a read-only token and receives no production secrets.

exceptions.reason: The serializer is reached through copy-webpack-plugin with repository-controlled build configuration and assets, not runtime input.
exceptions.control: Build only reviewed repository source; pull-request CI uses a read-only token and receives no production secrets.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when the @wordpress/scripts copy-webpack-plugin path resolves serialize-javascript 7.0.5 or newer.

exceptions.reason: The proxy is reachable only through the local webpack development server and is absent from shipped assets.
exceptions.control: Bind development servers to loopback and never expose their proxy endpoints to untrusted networks or Host headers.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when @wordpress/scripts resolves http-proxy-middleware 3.0.6 or newer.

exceptions.reason: The parser is used by repository Markdown linting and does not process user content in shipped Corex runtime.
exceptions.control: Lint only reviewed repository documentation; pull-request CI uses a read-only token and receives no production secrets.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when the @wordpress/scripts Markdown lint path resolves markdown-it above 14.1.1.

exceptions.reason: The affected server is a local @wordpress/scripts development dependency and is absent from shipped plugin assets.
exceptions.control: Bind development servers to loopback, use HTTPS where supported, and never expose them to untrusted networks.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when @wordpress/scripts provides webpack-dev-server 5.2.5 or newer.

exceptions.reason: The affected matcher is reachable only through the repository Markdown linter and is not shipped to WordPress sites.
exceptions.control: Lint only reviewed repository files; pull-request CI uses a read-only token and receives no production secrets.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when the @wordpress/scripts Markdown lint path resolves minimatch 3.1.3 or newer.

exceptions.reason: OpenTelemetry is reached through Lighthouse test tooling and does not receive public request baggage in Corex runtime.
exceptions.control: Run Lighthouse only against controlled test URLs and do not forward untrusted baggage headers into the test process.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when the @wordpress/scripts Lighthouse/Sentry path resolves @opentelemetry/core 2.8.0 or newer.

exceptions.reason: The affected server is a local @wordpress/scripts development dependency and is absent from shipped plugin assets.
exceptions.control: Bind development servers to loopback, never expose them to untrusted networks, and avoid untrusted sites while they run.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when @wordpress/scripts provides webpack-dev-server 5.2.5 or newer.

exceptions.reason: The parser is used by wp-env and coverage configuration with repository-controlled YAML, not by Corex runtime input.
exceptions.control: Parse only reviewed repository configuration; do not pass untrusted YAML to wp-env or coverage tooling.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when @wordpress/env and Istanbul parent packages resolve js-yaml above 4.1.1.

exceptions.reason: The affected server is a local @wordpress/scripts development dependency and is absent from shipped plugin assets.
exceptions.control: Bind development servers to loopback and do not use permissive user-controlled proxies while HMR is active.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when @wordpress/scripts provides webpack-dev-server 5.2.5 or newer.

exceptions.reason: The serializer is reached through copy-webpack-plugin with repository-controlled build configuration and assets, not runtime input.
exceptions.control: Build only reviewed repository source; pull-request CI uses a read-only token and receives no production secrets.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when the @wordpress/scripts copy-webpack-plugin path resolves serialize-javascript 7.0.5 or newer.

exceptions.reason: UUID is reached through sockjs in the local webpack development server and is absent from shipped assets.
exceptions.control: Bind development servers to loopback, do not expose sockjs to untrusted networks, and do not supply external UUID buffers.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when the @wordpress/scripts webpack-dev-server/sockjs path resolves uuid 11.1.1 or newer.

exceptions.reason: The advisory affects the Windows development server; the published docs are static build output and do not include the server.
exceptions.control: Bind the docs development server to loopback, do not expose it to untrusted networks, and stop it after local use.
exceptions.upstreamTrigger: Remove when the supported Astro/Vite line resolves esbuild 0.28.1 or newer.
